title: Delicious Velvet Mexican Haggis Tacos
description: A unique fusion of flavors featuring haggis in a taco shell, topped with a creamy velvet sauce and a sprinkle of Mexican spices. This dish is a bold twist on traditional Mexican cuisine.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook the haggis in the skillet for 5-7 minutes, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
In a small bowl, whisk together the velvet sauce and Mexican spices.
Add the velvet sauce mixture to the skillet with the haggis and stir to combine.
Warm the taco shells according to the package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the haggis mixture into the shells.
Serve the tacos with a drizzle of horchata, a sprinkle of queso fresco, and a squeeze of lime juice.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, sliced radishes, and chopped scallions.
